critical_code_review_comments: Role-based access control properly implemented: Admin sees all, Team Lead sees team's, Counselor sees own referrals
UTM tracking correctly auto-assigns counselor when utm_source matches counselor ID or email
Application number format SCH-YYYY-NNNN is correctly generated
All 7 status options work: Pending, Under Review, Contacted, Eligible, Not Eligible, Converted, Rejected
Duplicate application prevention within 24 hours works correctly
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test scholarship applications during testing (prefixed with test_, minimal_, utm_, dup_, update_test_, single_test_, delete_test_, nodelete_test_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested the new Scholarship Applications feature. All backend APIs and frontend pages are working correctly. The feature includes: 1) Admin panel at /admin/scholarship-applications with full CRUD, filtering, search, status updates, and counselor assignment. 2) Counselor portal at /scholarships with referral tracking, stats, and UTM link generation. 3) Role-based access control is properly implemented. 4) Application numbers follow SCH-YYYY-NNNN format. 5) UTM tracking auto-assigns counselor when utm_source matches counselor ID or email.

endpoints: POST /api/scholarship-applications - Public endpoint for creating applications

features: Search by name, email, phone, application number
Detail dialog with full application info
Stats cards (Total Referrals, Pending, Converted, Conversion Rate)
Get Referral Link button with UTM dialog

details: Team Lead sees team members' applications
Counselor sees only own referrals (by counselor_id or utm_source)
Auto-assigns counselor when utm_source matches counselor ID or email
